subcodes.first_line: O my God, unto Thee be praise for having rent asunder before the eyes of all hearts the veils of light and the shadows of impenetrable darkness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لک الحمد یا الهی بما خرقت ابصار القلوب حجبات النور و سبحات الظلام الدیجور
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @spiritual transformation, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for protection
